title: Apollo Acquires Two Live-Events Businesses in Latest Deals
body:
In a significant move to expand its presence in the live-events industry, a prominent investment firm, Apollo, has struck deals to acquire two major players in the sector: Emerald Holding and Questex. The planned acquisition is set to bring together two companies with a rich history of organizing trade shows, conferences, and other live events, with the goal of creating a powerhouse in the industry. This strategic move is expected to have far-reaching implications for the live-events landscape, as the combined entity will boast an impressive portfolio of events and a strong presence in various markets.

The acquisition of Emerald Holding and Questex is a testament to Apollo's confidence in the growth potential of the live-events industry. Despite the challenges posed by the pandemic, the sector has shown resilience and adaptability, with many events successfully transitioning to virtual or hybrid formats. As the world returns to a sense of normalcy, the demand for in-person events is expected to surge, driven by the need for human connection, networking, and experiential marketing. By combining Emerald Holding and Questex, Apollo is positioning itself to capitalize on this trend, leveraging the strengths of both companies to create a robust and diversified events business.

Emerald Holding, with its extensive portfolio of trade shows and conferences, brings a wealth of expertise in organizing large-scale events across various industries, including retail, technology, and healthcare. Questex, on the other hand, has a strong presence in the digital events space, with a focus on conferences, tradeshows, and online communities. By merging these two companies, Apollo will be able to offer a comprehensive range of events and services, catering to the diverse needs of its clients and attendees. The combined entity will also have a significant presence in key markets, including the United States, Europe, and Asia, providing a strong platform for growth and expansion.

The acquisition is also expected to drive innovation and investment in the live-events industry, as Apollo brings its financial resources and expertise to the table. With the combined entity, the company will be able to invest in new technologies, talent, and infrastructure, enhancing the overall event experience and providing more value to attendees and exhibitors. Furthermore, the deal is likely to lead to the creation of new events and formats, as well as the expansion of existing ones, as the company seeks to capitalize on emerging trends and opportunities in the industry.

The live-events industry is highly competitive, with many players vying for market share and attention. However, the combination of Emerald Holding and Questex, backed by Apollo's resources and expertise, is likely to create a formidable player in the sector. As the industry continues to evolve and adapt to changing consumer preferences and technological advancements, the combined entity will be well-positioned to navigate these changes and stay ahead of the curve. With a strong foundation in place, the company will be able to focus on innovation, growth, and expansion, driving long-term success and profitability.

As the live-events industry looks to the future, the acquisition of Emerald Holding and Questex by Apollo is a significant development that is likely to have a lasting impact. With the combined entity poised for growth and expansion, the company is set to play a major role in shaping the future of the industry. As the world becomes increasingly interconnected and experiential marketing continues to gain importance, the demand for high-quality, engaging live events is expected to surge. With its strong portfolio of events, diversified services, and commitment to innovation, the combined entity is well-positioned to capitalize on this trend, driving growth, innovation, and success in the years to come.
